summary: San Francisco film shoot locations with production details available via Google BigQuery. Columns include title, release year, locations, fun facts, production company, distributor, director, writer, and lead actors.

San Francisco neighborhood boundary and centroid data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include neighborhood name, internal point latitude/longitude, internal point geometry, and neighborhood polygon geometry.

San Francisco Fire Department service call records available via Google BigQuery. Columns include call number, unit ID, incident number, call type, call/watch dates, and received/entry/dispatch/response timestamps.

San Francisco Police Department incident reports available via Google BigQuery. Columns include unique key, crime category, description, day of week, police district, resolution, address, longitude, latitude, and location.
San Francisco Muni transit service schedule data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include service ID, service description, and operating days (Sunday through Saturday) with exception dates.

San Francisco street tree inventory available via Google BigQuery. Columns include tree ID, legal status, species, address, site order, site info, plant type, care taker, care assistant, and plant date.

Social Determinants of Health BEA CA-INC30 personal income data by county available via Google BigQuery. Columns include year, geo FIPS, geo name, employer contributions to pension/insurance and government/social insurance, farm and nonfarm proprietors income/employment, and income maintenance benefits.

Social Determinants of Health CDC WONDER natality data by county available via Google BigQuery. Columns include year, county of residence, county FIPS, births, average mother's age, average gestational age (OE and LMP), average birth weight, average pre-pregnancy BMI, and average prenatal care weeks.

Social Determinants of Health CMS Medicare and Medicaid dual-eligible enrollment by county available via Google BigQuery. Columns include state abbreviation, county name, and enrollment counts for QMB Only, QMB Plus Full, SLMB Only, SLMB Plus Full, QDWI, QI, other full, and public total.

Social Determinants of Health HRSA health professional shortage area designations available via Google BigQuery. Columns include source ID/name, status code/description, type code/description, address, city, state abbreviation, and postal code.

Social Determinants of Health HUD assisted housing project data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include HUD ID, project name, project address/city/state/ZIP, state ID, contact, company, and company address.

Social Determinants of Health HUD Point-in-Time homelessness data by Continuum of Care available via Google BigQuery. Columns include CoC number/name/category, overall homeless count, sheltered (emergency shelter, transitional housing, safe haven), unsheltered, and total individual homeless counts.

Social Determinants of Health SNAP enrollment data by geography available via Google BigQuery. Columns include geographic description, FIPS code, date, SNAP participation persons and households (public assistance, non-public assistance, all), and total SNAP issuance.

SEC EDGAR quarterly financial statement data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include submission number, group, arc, negative indicator, parent tag/version, child tag/version, segments hash, and segments.
Stack Overflow questions, answers, and tag data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ID, name, date, user ID, class, tag-based indicator, text, creation date, and post ID.

Google Project Sunroof solar potential data by census place available via Google BigQuery. Columns include region name, state name, latitude and longitude bounds and averages, yearly sunlight kWh/kW threshold average, and qualified roof count.

The General Index of scientific literature metadata available via Google BigQuery. Columns include document key, raw ID, meta key, document DOI, meta DOI, DOI, DOI flag, ISBN, journal, and document title.

The Metropolitan Museum of Art open access collection data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include object ID, public caption, title, original image URL, caption, open access status, GCS URL, object number, highlight indicator, and public domain indicator.
TheLook e-commerce synthetic retail dataset available via Google BigQuery. Columns include distribution center ID/name/location, user ID, session sequence number, session ID, and created timestamp.

TPC-DS 10TB benchmark synthetic retail data schema available via Google BigQuery. Columns include call center surrogate key/ID, record start/end dates, closed/open date keys, name, class, employee count, and square footage.

TPC-DS 1GB benchmark synthetic retail data schema available via Google BigQuery. Columns include call center surrogate key/ID, record start/end dates, closed/open date keys, name, class, employee count, and square footage.

Google Travel Impact Model flight emissions data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include carrier, flight number, departure date, origin, destination, and CO2 emissions in grams per passenger for economy, premium economy, business, and first class.

UCB Fung Institute disambiguated patent assignee data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include patent number, PDPASS, disambiguated assignee ID, company name, geography, country, state, and city.

University of Miami LINCS cell line and drug response signature data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include model system ID/class, cell line name/LINCS ID/organ/precursor/tissue, and signature ID.

United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDG) indicator data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include goal, target, indicator, series code/description, geo area code/name, time period, value, and time detail.

U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey detailed tables available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ID, provider ID, type, name, extended name, observation subject, variable measured, and value.
U.S. residential real estate valuation data by block available via Google BigQuery. Columns include block ID, FIPS, ZIP code, MSA, state, latitude, longitude, property type, and value percentiles.

USA contagious disease incidence data by state and disease type available via Google BigQuery. Columns include epidemiological week, state, location, location type, disease name, case count, and incidence per 100,000 population.

Library of Congress National Jukebox historical sound recording metadata available via Google BigQuery. Columns include URL, recording repository, label, take number, recording date, part-of reference, names, matrix number, catalog number, and media size.
U.S. baby names frequency data by state and year available via Google BigQuery. Columns include state, gender, year, name, and count.

USDA National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) agricultural survey data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include source, sector, group, commodity, class, production practice, utilization practice, statistic category, unit description, and short description.

USDA Forest Inventory and Analysis (FIA) plot data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include sequence number, plot sequence number, inventory year, state code/name, survey unit code/name, county code/name, and phase 2 plot number.

U.S. International Trade Commission (USITC) investigation case data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include case row ID, case number, party type, attorney row count, party/attorney name, contact info, position, prosecution status, and key dates.
USPTO Office of the Chief Economist patent assignment data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include RF ID, assignee name, address lines, city, state, postcode, and country.

USPTO Office of the Chief Economist cancer patent data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include patent/publication ID, publication number, family ID, application number, filing date, grant/publication date, and CPC/IPC classification codes.
USPTO Office of the Chief Economist patent claims data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include publication number, patent number, claim number, claim text, and dependency references.

USPTO Office of the Chief Economist patent litigation data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include case row ID, case number, party row count, party type, attorney row count, name, contact info, and position.

USPTO Office of the Chief Economist patent office action data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include application ID, cited patent/PGPUB ID, parsed indicator, IFW number, action type/subtype, form 892/1449 references, and citation-in-OA indicator.

USPTO PAIR (Patent Application Information Retrieval) inventor data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include application number, inventor first/middle/last names, rank, region code, country code/name, and address type.

USPTO Patent Trial and Appeal Board (PTAB) proceeding data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include application number, inventor name, patent owner name, last modified datetime, institution decision date, prosecution status, filing date, patent number, and petitioner party name.

Country code utility reference table for EU region available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country name, FIPS code, alpha-2/3 codes, numeric code, STANAG code, ccTLDs, continent code/name, and sub-continent name.

Country code utility reference table for US region available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country name, FIPS code, alpha-2/3 codes, numeric code, STANAG code, ccTLDs, continent code/name, and sub-continent name.
Wikipedia pageview statistics by language and article available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date/hour, wiki language code, article title, and view count.

NASA WISE All-Sky infrared astronomical source catalog available via Google BigQuery. Columns include designation, right ascension, declination, RA/Dec uncertainties, RA/Dec correlation, galactic longitude/latitude, and ecliptic longitude/latitude.
World Bank global population data by country from 1960 onward available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country name, country code, and annual population figures by year.

World Bank health and population indicator data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country code, series code, description, short name, table name, long name, two alpha code, currency unit, and special notes.

World Bank international debt statistics available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country code, series code, description, short name, table name, long name, two alpha code, currency unit, and special notes.

World Bank international education statistics available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country code, series code, description, short name, table name, long name, two alpha code, currency unit, and special notes.

World Bank World Development Indicators (WDI) data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country code, series code, description, short name, table name, long name, two alpha code, currency unit, and special notes.
World Bank World Development Indicators (WDI) time series data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include year, country name, country code, indicator name, indicator code, and indicator value.

WorldPop gridded global population estimates by country available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country name, geo ID, population, longitude centroid, latitude centroid, alpha-3 code, geography, and last updated date.
